---
title: "Model-Structured Neural Networks
to Model & Control Robots"
author:
  - "Mattia Piccinini"
  - "Aniello Mungiello"
  - "Johannes Betz"
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "ICRA 2025 — Late breaking results (2025)"
type: poster
categories:
  - "Posters"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "ICRA 2025 — Late breaking results"
venue: "ICRA 2025 — Late breaking results"
year: 2025
doi: ""
poster_pdf: poster.pdf
pub_number: 53
order: -53
image: poster.png
---

::: {.poster-preview}
![](poster.png){fig-alt="Poster: Open-source PyTorch library for model-structured neural networks (nnodely)" width=95%}
:::
